purpose: Publication-oriented error taxonomy and casebook plan for CadStruct MoE scene-graph parsing, based only on existing audits/reports and pending manual pilot labels.

taxonomy.description: Symbol detector policies trade recall, precision proxy, and prediction inflation; v28 remains default, P0-76 is opt-in.
taxonomy.evidence: P0-85: P0-76 improves symbol IoU recall by +0.020734 with inflation increase +0.168262 and no graph-health regression.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Visual examples showing recovered symbols vs extra candidates, especially tiny sinks/showers/equipment.

taxonomy.description: Baseline fusion_v2 under-links geometrically valid room-symbol contains relations.
taxonomy.evidence: P0-90/P0-95: dev missing contains 2035 and extra 277; center_ratio_1_top4 reduces both to 0 on expected-json validation paths.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Before/after graph overlays for room-symbol containment, including multi-room ambiguity cases.

taxonomy.description: Some symbols are validly contained by multiple room/space bboxes due overlapping room annotations or open-plan layouts.
taxonomy.evidence: P0-93/P0-95 diagnostics: candidate adds 1966 multi-room symbols on dev and 318 on secondary smoke.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Manual examples with ambiguous labels and reviewer notes; do not force single-edge ground truth.

taxonomy.description: Registered expert model-output path has non-symbol node weaknesses, especially boundary classification/coverage.
taxonomy.evidence: Model fused smoke: boundary node F1 0.774974, space 0.886297, text 0.994737.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Boundary false labels/misses in model-output path, separated from oracle expected-json fusion.

taxonomy.description: Space nodes are better than boundary/symbol in registered model smoke but still interact with contains relation quality.
taxonomy.evidence: Model fused smoke: space node F1 0.886297; contains relation policies depend on room bboxes.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Room bbox ambiguity cases and open-plan layouts.

taxonomy.description: Text expert appears saturated in current registered model smoke and should be deprioritized unless new evidence appears.
taxonomy.evidence: Model fused smoke: text node F1 0.994737.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Only collect text cases if relation labeling or room-label errors appear in real pilot.

taxonomy.description: Cross-source assets exist, but public_raster has target labels without relation graph and real registry has metadata without labels.
taxonomy.evidence: P1-97A: public_raster dev has CubiCasa5K/FloorPlanCAD targets; P1-97B/97C created a 30-record unlabeled scene-graph pilot.
taxonomy.casebook_need: Use the pilot to create real/cross-source visual evidence; do not claim relation F1 before labels exist.

main_text: Use E2/E3 to motivate relation-policy design and validation gates.
Use E1 to explain why symbol work is packaged as default/opt-in rather than endlessly tuned.
Use E7 to honestly state current generalization limits and annotation-pilot plan.
